description:
This Genie answers all the Acquisition Funnel related questions.
- Customer level data.
- Includes all acquisition funnel steps- from Reg to FTD (Reg, V1, V2, V3, EV, PhoneVerification, EmailVerification, POA/POI, Screening, FTD).
- Can show aggregated data or specific users' data (by uploading a list).
- Can show Cohort view (e.g. V1toV2 same week)/ Snapshot view.
- Absolute numbers/CVR trend over time.
serialized_space:
{
  "version": 2,
  "config": {
    "sample_questions": [
      {
        "id": "01f08bec74791acf8cd09ba32b6360a6",
        "question": [
          "Can you show me the weekly trend of FTD for the last 12 weeks?"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "01f08bedaa1a169382160d7881f43539",
        "question": [
          "Can you show me the weekly trend of FUNNEL onboarding 12 weeks?"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "01f08beef7801f34863ce8dca00155e6",
        "question": [
          "Can you show me the weekly trend of Registration for the last 12 weeks?"
        ]
      }
    ]
  },
  "data_sources": {
    "tables": [
      {
        "identifier": "main.bi_output_stg.vg_acquisition_funnel",
        "column_configs": [
          {
            "column_name": "IsVL1",
            "description": [
              "Is the user verified level 1 ?\n",
              "User who registered is verified V1"
            ],
            "synonyms": [
              "Verification Level 1",
              "Level 1 verified"
            ]
          },
          {
            "column_name": "SerialID",
            "description": [
              "Number of affiliate"
            ],
            "synonyms": [
              "affiliateID"
            ]
          }
        ]
      }
    ]
  },
  "instructions": {
    "text_instructions": [
      {
        "id": "01f089963ea419a2b930efd2534f409c",
        "content": [
          "- always format all rates in the following format ##,##%\r\n",
          "- Always filter on dates in every request.\r\n",
          "- do not answer any questions without a timeframe defined in the question. If a question without a timeframe is asked, always ask to add timeframe\r\n",
          "- always ask the user the time aggregation levels (Daily, weekly, monthly)\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "- \"Without bots\" = always exclude SubChannel = 'Direct' and Channel = 'RAF'\r\n",
          "- \"POA data\" - always show try & success as conv rate from the v2 same week\r\n",
          "- \"POI data\"- always show try & success as conv rate from the v2 same week\r\n",
          "- \"EV data\"- always show try & success as conv rate from the v2 same week\r\n",
          "show as graph with lines always \r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "always show graph as well\r\n",
          "- \"Screening data\"- always show try & success as conv rate from the v2 same week\r\n",
          "always show graph as well\r\n",
          "- \"Phone verification data\"- always show try & success as conv rate from the v2 same week\r\n",
          "always show graph as well\r\n",
          "- conversion_rate = CVR = always show conversion rate with % and 4 digits after the dot.\r\n",
          "- \"data\" = always show chart and graph \r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "- \"how many ftd or reg or v1 or v2 or v3\" = if it absolute numbers show always with a bar chart and not line.\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "- if asking for a daily level always cast the datetime (example V2_Date) to date. also for V2_Date, V1_Date, V3_Date, FTD_Date.\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "- if asking for a daily level (count) show always as bar and not as line \r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "- ftd_date = '1900-01-01' is not ftd! never. ignore it\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "- Always calc ftd like that  \r\n",
          "SELECT\r\n",
          "SUM(IsFTD) AS FTD_Count\r\n",
          "and not sum by day/week/month date \r\n",
          "always filter out the years 1899 and 1900\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "-Onboarding Funnel health, Onboarding data is alyways : \r\n",
          "EV data, Phone verification data, Screening data, POA data, POI data\r\n",
          "always show with bots either user says different \r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "-Can you show me the weekly trend main conversion rates for the last 12 weeks?\r\n",
          " always with graph\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          " -Can you show me the weekly trend of FUNNEL onboarding 12 weeks?\r\n",
          " INCLUDE BOTS, Let the user choose country\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          " -Can you show me the weekly trend of FTD for the last 12 weeks?\r\n",
          "always with bar graph\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "\r\n",
          "-show me the v2->v3 conversion rate in a weekly level of Germany, Italy & australia  in the last 10 weeks \r\n",
          "show me with bots first- dont ask to remove or not \r\n"
        ]
      }
    ],
    "example_question_sqls": [
      {
        "id": "01f0898daed314238c69f6f8713cd088",
        "question": [
          "how many users registered during 2025?"
        ],
        "sql": [
          "SELECT\r\n",
          "  COUNT(`vg_acquisition_funnel`.`CID`)\r\n",
          "FROM\r\n",
          "  `main`.`bi_output_stg`.`vg_acquisition_funnel`\r\n",
          "WHERE\r\n",
          "  YEAR(`vg_acquisition_funnel`.`DateTime_Reg`) = 2025"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "01f08993056114e58743db0dc12bd458",
        "question": [
          "you need to divide V1toV2_SameWeek_Count by all the v1 of each week"
        ],
        "sql": [
          "SELECT\n",
          "  `VL1_SOW` as V1_Week,\n",
          "  sum(`V1toV2SameWeek`)/sum(`IsVL1`) AS `Conversion_Rate`\n",
          "FROM\n",
          "  `main`.`bi_output_stg`.`vg_acquisition_funnel`\n",
          "WHERE\n",
          "  `VL1_SOW` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, 34) AND CURRENT_DATE\n",
          "GROUP BY\n",
          "  `VL1_SOW`\n",
          "ORDER BY\n",
          "  `VL1_SOW`"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "01f0899534611c88a0de7ac799c696a6",
        "question": [
          "give me the v1->v2 conversion rate in germany in the last 12 weeks"
        ],
        "sql": [
          "SELECT\n",
          "  `VL1_SOW` as V1_Week,\n",
          "  try_divide(SUM(`V1toV2SameWeek`), SUM(`IsVL1`)) AS `Conversion_Rate`\n",
          "FROM\n",
          "  `main`.`bi_output_stg`.`vg_acquisition_funnel`\n",
          "WHERE\n",
          "  `Country` ILIKE '%Germany%'\n",
          "  AND `VL1_SOW` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, 83) AND CURRENT_DATE\n",
          "GROUP BY\n",
          "  `VL1_SOW`\n",
          "ORDER BY\n",
          "  `VL1_SOW`"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "01f0899549e61b11ba6b8ef7cba0eba7",
        "question": [
          "Without bots (it always will mean that you need to remove Subchannel = direct and remove RAF channel)"
        ],
        "sql": [
          "SELECT\r\n",
          "  `VL1_SOW` as V1_Week,\r\n",
          "  try_divide(SUM(`V1toV2SameWeek`), SUM(`IsVL1`)) AS `Conversion_Rate`\r\n",
          "FROM\r\n",
          "  `main`.`bi_output_stg`.`vg_acquisition_funnel`\r\n",
          "WHERE\r\n",
          "  `Country` ILIKE '%Germany%'\r\n",
          "  AND `SubChannel` NOT ILIKE '%direct%'\r\n",
          "  AND `Channel` NOT ILIKE '%RAF%'\r\n",
          "  AND `VL1_SOW` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, 83) AND CURRENT_DATE\r\n",
          "GROUP BY\r\n",
          "  `VL1_SOW`\r\n",
          "ORDER BY\r\n",
          "  `VL1_SOW`"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "01f08995ccb71700b940d44cd3f897a0",
        "question": [
          "Without bots (it always will mean that you need to remove Subchannel = direct and remove RAF channel)"
        ],
        "sql": [
          "SELECT\r\n",
          "  `VL1_SOW` as V1_Week,\r\n",
          "  try_divide(SUM(`V1toV2SameWeek`), SUM(`IsVL1`)) AS `Conversion_Rate`\r\n",
          "FROM\r\n",
          "  `main`.`bi_output_stg`.`vg_acquisition_funnel`\r\n",
          "WHERE\r\n",
          "  `Country` ILIKE '%Germany%'\r\n",
          "  AND `SubChannel` NOT ILIKE '%Direct%'\r\n",
          "  AND `Channel` NOT ILIKE '%RAF%'\r\n",
          "  AND `VL1_SOW` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, 83) AND CURRENT_DATE\r\n",
          "GROUP BY\r\n",
          "  `VL1_SOW`\r\n",
          "ORDER BY\r\n",
          "  `VL1_SOW`"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "01f089965bd0157d920d83a27c8c8af4",
        "question": [
          "no bots"
        ],
        "sql": [
          "SELECT\n",
          "  *\n",
          "FROM\n",
          "  `main`.`bi_output_stg`.`vg_acquisition_funnel`\n",
          "WHERE\n",
          "  `Channel` != 'Direct'\n",
          "  AND `Channel` != 'RAF'"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "01f089974ced18ac9038ad175f0beefb",
        "question": [
          "phone verification success is actually the isphovevereficationsuccess / try"
        ],
        "sql": [
          "SELECT\r\n",
          "  `VL2_SOW` as V2_Week,\r\n",
          "  try_divide(SUM(`Is_PhoneVerf_Try`), SUM(`IsVL2`)) AS `Try_Conversion_Rate`,\r\n",
          "  try_divide(SUM(`Is_PhoneVerf_Success`), SUM(`Is_PhoneVerf_Try`)) AS `Success_Conversion_Rate`\r\n",
          "FROM\r\n",
          "  `main`.`bi_output_stg`.`vg_acquisition_funnel`\r\n",
          "WHERE\r\n",
          "  `Country` ILIKE '%France%'\r\n",
          "  AND `VL2_SOW` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, 139) AND CURRENT_DATE\r\n",
          "GROUP BY\r\n",
          "  `VL2_SOW`\r\n",
          "ORDER BY\r\n",
          "  `VL2_SOW` "
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "01f08bc9b33415529e571d83c675b712",
        "question": [
          "give me the data of ev - france - last 10 weeks"
        ],
        "sql": [
          "SELECT\n",
          "  `VL2_SOW` as V2_Week,\n",
          "  try_divide(SUM(`IsEV_Try`), SUM(`IsVL2`)) AS `Try_Conversion_Rate`,\n",
          "  try_divide(SUM(`IsEV_Success`), SUM(`IsEV_Try`)) AS `Success_Conversion_Rate`\n",
          "FROM\n",
          "  `main`.`bi_output_stg`.`vg_acquisition_funnel`\n",
          "WHERE\n",
          "  `Country` ILIKE '%France%'\n",
          "  AND `VL2_SOW` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, 69) AND CURRENT_DATE\n",
          "GROUP BY\n",
          "  `VL2_SOW`\n",
          "ORDER BY\n",
          "  `VL2_SOW`"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "01f08bcc204910dfa2bac31dd11d883a",
        "question": [
          "you need to cast as date the v2_date"
        ],
        "sql": [
          "SELECT\n",
          "  CAST(`DateTime_VL2` AS DATE) AS `V2_Date`,\n",
          "  try_divide(SUM(`V2toV3SameWeek`), SUM(`IsVL2`)) AS `Conversion_Rate`\n",
          "FROM\n",
          "  `main`.`bi_output_stg`.`vg_acquisition_funnel`\n",
          "WHERE\n",
          "  `Country` ILIKE '%Germany%'\n",
          "  AND `DateTime_VL2` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, 30) AND CURRENT_DATE\n",
          "GROUP BY\n",
          "  CAST(`DateTime_VL2` AS DATE)\n",
          "ORDER BY\n",
          "  `V2_Date`"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "01f08bd3572618deb878549e1b6d3e8b",
        "question": [
          "give me ftd month level"
        ],
        "sql": [
          "SELECT\n",
          "  `FTD_SOM`,\n",
          "  SUM(IsFTD) AS `FTD_Count`\n",
          "FROM\n",
          "  `main`.`bi_output_stg`.`vg_acquisition_funnel`\n",
          "WHERE\n",
          "  `FTD_SOM` IS NOT NULL\n",
          "  AND `FTD_SOM` != '1899-12-31'\n",
          "  and `FTD_SOM`!= '1900-01-01'\n",
          "GROUP BY\n",
          "  `FTD_SOM`\n",
          "ORDER BY\n",
          "  `FTD_SOM`"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "01f08bd494931dbc9886dff6d67372a4",
        "question": [
          "show me a daily conv rate from v1 to v2 in france"
        ],
        "sql": [
          "SELECT\n",
          "  CAST(`DateTime_VL1` AS DATE) AS `V1_Date`,\n",
          "  try_divide(SUM(`IsVL2`), SUM(`IsVL1`)) AS `Conversion_Rate`\n",
          "FROM\n",
          "  `main`.`bi_output_stg`.`vg_acquisition_funnel`\n",
          "WHERE\n",
          "  `Country` ILIKE '%France%'\n",
          "  AND `DateTime_VL1` IS NOT NULL\n",
          "GROUP BY\n",
          "  CAST(`DateTime_VL1` AS DATE)\n",
          "ORDER BY\n",
          "  `V1_Date`"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "01f08bec32aa1fbc90086a57d84699b5",
        "question": [
          "Can you show me the weekly trend of FTD by region for the last 12 weeks?"
        ],
        "sql": [
          "SELECT\n",
          "  `FTD_SOW` AS `Week`,\n",
          "  `NewMarketingRegion` AS `Region`,\n",
          "  SUM(`IsFTD`) AS `FTD_Count`\n",
          "FROM\n",
          "  `main`.`bi_output_stg`.`vg_acquisition_funnel`\n",
          "WHERE\n",
          "  `FTD_SOW` IS NOT NULL\n",
          "\n",
          "  AND `FTD_SOW` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, 83) AND CURRENT_DATE\n",
          "GROUP BY\n",
          "  `FTD_SOW`,\n",
          "  `NewMarketingRegion`\n",
          "ORDER BY\n",
          "  `FTD_SOW`,\n",
          "  `NewMarketingRegion`"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "01f08bedf54915dab8e612683060a5cf",
        "question": [
          "german - without bots"
        ],
        "sql": [
          "SELECT\n",
          "  `VL2_SOW` as V2_Week,\n",
          "  try_divide(SUM(`IsEV_Try`), SUM(`IsVL2`)) AS `EV_Try_Conversion_Rate`,\n",
          "  try_divide(SUM(`IsEV_Success`), SUM(`IsEV_Try`)) AS `EV_Success_Conversion_Rate`,\n",
          "  try_divide(SUM(`Is_PhoneVerf_Try`), SUM(`IsVL2`)) AS `PhoneVerf_Try_Conversion_Rate`,\n",
          "  try_divide(\n",
          "    SUM(`Is_PhoneVerf_Success`), SUM(`Is_PhoneVerf_Try`)\n",
          "  ) AS `PhoneVerf_Success_Conversion_Rate`,\n",
          "  try_divide(SUM(`IsScreening_Try`), SUM(`IsVL2`)) AS `Screening_Try_Conversion_Rate`,\n",
          "  try_divide(\n",
          "    SUM(`IsScreening_Success`), SUM(`IsScreening_Try`)\n",
          "  ) AS `Screening_Success_Conversion_Rate`,\n",
          "  try_divide(SUM(`Is_POATry`), SUM(`IsVL2`)) AS `POA_Try_Conversion_Rate`,\n",
          "  try_divide(SUM(`Is_POAApproved`), SUM(`Is_POATry`)) AS `POA_Success_Conversion_Rate`,\n",
          "  try_divide(SUM(`Is_POITry`), SUM(`IsVL2`)) AS `POI_Try_Conversion_Rate`,\n",
          "  try_divide(SUM(`Is_POIApproved`), SUM(`Is_POITry`)) AS `POI_Success_Conversion_Rate`\n",
          "FROM\n",
          "  `main`.`bi_output_stg`.`vg_acquisition_funnel`\n",
          "WHERE\n",
          "  `Country` ILIKE '%Germany%'\n",
          "  AND `SubChannel` NOT ILIKE '%direct%'\n",
          "  AND `Channel` NOT ILIKE '%RAF%'\n",
          "  AND `VL2_SOW` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, 83) AND CURRENT_DATE\n",
          "GROUP BY\n",
          "  `VL2_SOW`\n",
          "ORDER BY\n",
          "  `VL2_SOW`"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "01f08bee78761ca2bcce3a338f4d1836",
        "question": [
          "always aggregate weekly, either said \"daily\"."
        ],
        "sql": [
          "SELECT\n",
          "  `VL2_SOW` as Week,\n",
          "  try_divide(SUM(`IsEV_Try`), SUM(`IsVL2`)) AS `EV_Try_Conversion_Rate`,\n",
          "  try_divide(SUM(`IsEV_Success`), SUM(`IsEV_Try`)) AS `EV_Success_Conversion_Rate`,\n",
          "  try_divide(SUM(`Is_PhoneVerf_Try`), SUM(`IsVL2`)) AS `PhoneVerf_Try_Conversion_Rate`,\n",
          "  try_divide(\n",
          "    SUM(`Is_PhoneVerf_Success`), SUM(`Is_PhoneVerf_Try`)\n",
          "  ) AS `PhoneVerf_Success_Conversion_Rate`,\n",
          "  try_divide(SUM(`IsScreening_Try`), SUM(`IsVL2`)) AS `Screening_Try_Conversion_Rate`,\n",
          "  try_divide(\n",
          "    SUM(`IsScreening_Success`), SUM(`IsScreening_Try`)\n",
          "  ) AS `Screening_Success_Conversion_Rate`,\n",
          "  try_divide(SUM(`Is_POATry`), SUM(`IsVL2`)) AS `POA_Try_Conversion_Rate`,\n",
          "  try_divide(SUM(`Is_POAApproved`), SUM(`Is_POATry`)) AS `POA_Success_Conversion_Rate`,\n",
          "  try_divide(SUM(`Is_POITry`), SUM(`IsVL2`)) AS `POI_Try_Conversion_Rate`,\n",
          "  try_divide(SUM(`Is_POIApproved`), SUM(`Is_POITry`)) AS `POI_Success_Conversion_Rate`\n",
          "FROM\n",
          "  `main`.`bi_output_stg`.`vg_acquisition_funnel`\n",
          "WHERE\n",
          "  `VL2_SOW` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, 83) AND CURRENT_DATE\n",
          "GROUP BY\n",
          "  `VL2_SOW`\n",
          "ORDER BY\n",
          "  `VL2_SOW`"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "01f08bf255271e3c932883b917fe4f95",
        "question": [
          "Can you show me the weekly trend main conversion rates for the last 12 weeks?"
        ],
        "sql": [
          "SELECT\n",
          "  `Reg_SOW` AS `Week`,\n",
          "  try_divide(SUM(`IsVL1`), COUNT(`CID`)) AS `Reg_to_V1_CVR`,\n",
          "  try_divide(SUM(`V1toV2SameWeek`), SUM(`IsVL1`)) AS `V1_to_V2_CVR`,\n",
          "  try_divide(SUM(`V2toV3SameWeek`), SUM(`IsVL2`)) AS `V2_to_V3_CVR`,\n",
          "  try_divide(SUM(`V3toFTDSameWeek`), SUM(`IsVL3`)) AS `V3_to_FTD_CVR`\n",
          "FROM\n",
          "  `main`.`bi_output_stg`.`vg_acquisition_funnel`\n",
          "WHERE\n",
          "  `Reg_SOW` IS NOT NULL\n",
          "  AND `Reg_SOW` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, 83) AND CURRENT_DATE\n",
          "GROUP BY\n",
          "  `Reg_SOW`\n",
          "ORDER BY\n",
          "  `Reg_SOW`"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "01f08bf2f42f134fa2b49334b55e1f0e",
        "question": [
          "with bots - germany"
        ],
        "sql": [
          "SELECT\n",
          "  `VL2_SOW` AS `Week`,\n",
          "  try_divide(SUM(`IsEV_Try`), SUM(`IsVL2`)) AS `EV_Try_CVR`,\n",
          "  try_divide(SUM(`IsEV_Success`), SUM(`IsEV_Try`)) AS `EV_Success_CVR`,\n",
          "  try_divide(SUM(`Is_PhoneVerf_Try`), SUM(`IsVL2`)) AS `PhoneVerf_Try_CVR`,\n",
          "  try_divide(SUM(`Is_PhoneVerf_Success`), SUM(`Is_PhoneVerf_Try`)) AS `PhoneVerf_Success_CVR`,\n",
          "  try_divide(SUM(`IsScreening_Try`), SUM(`IsVL2`)) AS `Screening_Try_CVR`,\n",
          "  try_divide(SUM(`IsScreening_Success`), SUM(`IsScreening_Try`)) AS `Screening_Success_CVR`,\n",
          "  try_divide(SUM(`Is_POATry`), SUM(`IsVL2`)) AS `POA_Try_CVR`,\n",
          "  try_divide(SUM(`Is_POAApproved`), SUM(`Is_POATry`)) AS `POA_Success_CVR`,\n",
          "  try_divide(SUM(`Is_POITry`), SUM(`IsVL2`)) AS `POI_Try_CVR`,\n",
          "  try_divide(SUM(`Is_POIApproved`), SUM(`Is_POITry`)) AS `POI_Success_CVR`\n",
          "FROM\n",
          "  `main`.`bi_output_stg`.`vg_acquisition_funnel`\n",
          "WHERE\n",
          "  `Country` ILIKE '%Germany%'\n",
          "  AND `VL2_SOW` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, 83) AND CURRENT_DATE\n",
          "GROUP BY\n",
          "  `VL2_SOW`\n",
          "ORDER BY\n",
          "  `VL2_SOW`"
        ]
      },
      {
        "id": "01f08c18dc451cd6ac6c1f116949403f",
        "question": [
          "yes"
        ],
        "sql": [
          "SELECT\n",
          "  `FTD_SOW` AS `Week`,\n",
          "  `Country`,\n",
          "  SUM(`IsFTD`) AS `FTD_Count`\n",
          "FROM\n",
          "  `main`.`bi_output_stg`.`vg_acquisition_funnel`\n",
          "WHERE\n",
          "  `FTD_SOW` IS NOT NULL\n",
          "  AND `Country` ILIKE '%Germany%'\n",
          "  OR `Country` ILIKE '%France%'\n",
          "  OR `Country` ILIKE '%Italy%'\n",
          "  AND `FTD_SOW` BETWEEN DATE_SUB(CURRENT_DATE, 69) AND CURRENT_DATE\n",
          "  and year(FTD_SOW) != '1899'\n",
          "GROUP BY\n",
          "  `FTD_SOW`,\n",
          "  `Country`\n",
          "ORDER BY\n",
          "  `FTD_SOW`,\n",
          "  `Country`"
        ]
      }
    ]
  }
}
title: eToro Marketing Acquisition
